dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry conditions: (1) Price climbs less than 5% represented as returns < 0.05 in decimal scale; (2) Price heading down represented as close < prev_close. Exit condition: Use reversal above SMA_20 as reasonable exit per RULE 8 since AUTHOR_SILENT. Pattern described as busted breakout with bearish bias suggests short direction. Stop loss set to 5% matching failure_rate_5pct parameter. Hold period set conservatively at 20 days for pattern-based trades.

source_rule_text: Busted Pattern: Price climbs less than 5% before tumbling
